DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-06-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES (via Zoom):

Sydney Chase; Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.; 415-771-9850; appearing on behalf of plaintiffs Jeanine Reisbig and Gale Golden.
Mark Wilson; Manning & Kass, Ellrod, Ramirez, Trester LLP; 415-217-6990; appearing on behalf of defendant Vanguard Properties, Inc.

Court reporter: Rocio Lopez, CSR #11194, rlopez@sftc.org.

Not contested. Plaintiff's counsel seeks clarification and asks for 20 days leave to amend. The court grants plaintiffs request. The court modifies the tentative ruling and rules as follows:

DEFENDANT VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained with 20 days leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of each element of causes of action for negligence, nuisance, UCL violation and breach of contract against the moving defendant.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Court reporter: Rocio Lopez, CSR #11194, rlopez@sftc.org. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendant Vanguard Properties, Inc. Motion To Strike Portions Of Plaintiffs Complaint; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Dec-06-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES (via Zoom):

Sydney Chase; Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc.; 415-771-9850; appearing on behalf of plaintiffs Jeanine Reisbig and Gale Golden.
Mark Wilson; Manning & Kass, Ellrod, Ramirez, Trester LLP; 415-217-6990; appearing on behalf of defendant Vanguard Properties, Inc.

Court reporter: Rocio Lopez, CSR #11194, rlopez@sftc.org.

Not contested. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC.'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFFS COMPLAINT is moot in light of the ruling in the demurrer. If amended complaint does not contain sufficient facts to support claims and prayers subject to this motion, Defendant may raise these issues again.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Court reporter: Rocio Lopez, CSR #11194, rlopez@sftc.org. (D501)
